content.en:
How terrifying a Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm with a supreme bloodline would be, Ye Tian would know if he thought about it.

This is like letting his cultivation break through to the Ninefold Dao Realm, even a genius like the Su Domain Lord will be killed in an instant, and he has no power to resist.

It is extremely difficult to go to the Supreme Dao Realm of the Strongest Dao Realm, and it is extremely difficult to become a Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, let alone the Ninefold Highest Dao Realm!

It is impossible for the Innate Origin Domain Alliance to sit idly by and watch the side of the Supreme Dao Void Demon give birth to a Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon with a supreme bloodline, so it will do its best to protect the Blood River Fortress.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's three replica bodies went to the Blood River Fortress with the Su Domain Lord, but he also placed almost all the other duplicated bodies in the Winter Night Fortress to prevent the Winter Night Fortress from being breached.

Whether the Blood River Fortress is broken or not, he doesn't care, he just has to deal with the Innate Origin Domain Alliance!

The Winter Night Fortress is the place he cares about the most, and there must be no trouble here.

......

Blood River Fortress.

Ye Tian came here, assigned a mansion, and without the invasion of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, he practiced here as usual.

However, he also went out occasionally to form a bond with the upper echelons of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

The Innate Origin Domain Alliance is an idle alliance, but the highest level has terrifying rights.

First of all, the real chess players of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance are those elders, anyway, he has never seen or heard the information of these elders, and it seems to be very mysterious.

Even in the calamity, these patriarchs did not come out.

Under the patriarchs, even the old monsters at the elder level rarely come forward, and only occasionally give orders in the Supreme Void.

Below are the deacons, these deacons are undoubtedly the powerhouses of the Nine Folds Dao Realm, and the Su Domain Lord is the new deacon, and his status is above Ye Tian.

Below are the official members, the strength is uneven, and the number is also very large.

But there is no doubt that even if he is a full member, his status is very high, at least he has entered the circle of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

Ye Tian now knows a few deacons in addition to knowing the Su Domain Lord, and he also has a lot of fame in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance now, after all, he has killed too many Dao Realms, and he also has the ability of a clone, and his life-saving ability is high.

Therefore, many deacons of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance were also willing to befriend him.

But elder-level existences can be seen in the Supreme Void at most, but don't want to know them.

......

"More and more Ninefold Dao Realm are coming to the Blood River Fortress, and the Innate Origin Domain Alliance really attaches great importance to the Blood River Fortress!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, he also saw an acquaintance and a fellow countryman - Taibai Sword Master!

At this time, the Taibai Sword Master was still a sixfold Dao realm peak cultivator, but his aura was more condensed.

In a place like the Blood River Fortress, it is undoubtedly very risky for the Taibai Sword Lord to dare to come.

I don't know if the Taibai Sword Master was forcibly co-opted over, or if he mainly came over.

"Ye Tian, you're here too!"

The Taibai Sword Lord saw Ye Tian and walked over.

When he noticed that Ye Tian's cultivation had reached the Sevenfold Dao Realm, he was very surprised.

Not to mention the progress of the Dao rules, just the improvement speed of cultivation is too fast!

In the midst of the calamity, it's too late to save your life, how can you have time to cultivate!

"Taibai Sword Master, the Blood River Battlefield is very dangerous, and even the Nine Folds Dao Realm may fall, why are you here?" Ye Tian asked.

The Taibai Sword Lord said helplessly: "I'm just a little bit away from exchanging the sixth sequence rule items. It's hard to get battle merits in other places, so I thought about taking the opportunity to earn a battle merit, and when the time comes, I can directly apply to exchange for the sixth sequence of Dao rule items. In this way, I can comprehend the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and I can go to the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm!"

He was even ready to attack the treasure resources of the Sevenfold Dao Realm, and once he comprehended the rules of the Sixth Sequence of the Dao Realm, he could immediately go to the Sevenfold Dao Realm, and the success rate was definitely close to one hundred percent.

"Then I wish you all the best!"

Ye Tian said.

It's been another time.

The Void Demon of the Supreme Dao has finally arrived!!!

......

Outside the Blood River Fortress.

Ye Tian looked at the dense number of Supreme Dao Void Demons, almost all of them were above the sixth-fold Dao Void Demon, the seventh-fold Dao Void Demon, the eighth-fold Dao Void Demon, and even the ninth-fold Dao Void Demon, and there were many of them.

The battlefield of the Winter Night Fortress is nothing compared to here!

When Ye Tian saw so many Supreme Dao Void Demons, he felt his scalp tingle.

Bang!!!!!

The two sides began to collide and a fight ensued.

Ye Tian's three replica bodies are also in three areas.

An eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon wanted to kill Ye Tian casually, but was killed by Ye Tian casually.

His current fifth-sequence supreme dao rules have comprehended eighty-in-one realm, and this is all because he has been constantly exchanging the black abyss devouring stone for a long time, refining and comprehending the fifth-sequence supreme dao rules.

That's why his Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule progressed so quickly.

He was ready to use this battle to earn more battle merits and exchange them for more Black Abyss Devouring Stones.

Perhaps, he will have a way to comprehend the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to the Ten Percent Realm.

Puff puff!!!

A large number of Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons were killed by Ye Tian in seconds, but he was quickly targeted by a Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon.

Thundered!!!

He was constantly fighting with that Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon, and he had no time to kill other Supreme Dao Void Demons.

But.

He also fought desperately, completely ignoring his injuries, and vowed to inflict heavy injuries on the other side.

And that Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon was also frightened by Ye Tian's ruthlessness, and the other party's strength was indeed not good, and he was injured after a while.

Afterwards.

A Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm just solved the other party, came to assist Ye Tian, and the two sides quickly beheaded this Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon.

On the battlefield of the Blood River Fortress.

The sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon and even the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon are almost cannon fodder, and even the Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon may be killed in seconds.

A certain moment.

As soon as a powerhouse that could be called the Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon was invincible, he directly annihilated an area.

One of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies did not dodge and was directly killed.

This is a very helpless situation, but what is even more unfortunate is that the other Supreme Dao realms have lost their lives before they even have time to resist.

Suddenly.

A certain node of the Blood River Fortress was broken, Ye Tian rushed over to support, and when he went, the node had already been partially destroyed, affecting the large array of the Blood River Fortress.

Of course.

The battles at these nodes are all minor problems, and it mainly depends on the main battlefield.

......

Node No. 1 location.

The Fortress of the Blood River Fortress, the Lord of the Fortress, Emperor Luo Ri, is fighting against a strong man who can be called the invincible Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon.

They are equal in strength.

But not long after, a young man suddenly appeared, his right hand crossed the countless voids, and a blow pierced through the body of the blood leader, severely damaging the blood group.

The blood man quickly distanced himself and looked at the young man in horror: "Immortal Emperor, why are you back!!"
